name: Get Profile
description: Auth users table is `auth_users`; username lives in the JSONB `metadata` column and is queried with `metadata->>'username'`. Route is deliberately unauthenticated (no `auth.jwt` middleware, must not 401 anonymously). Noda has no in-workflow JWT decode/verify node (only `util.jwt_sign` exists) so the caller's identity cannot be recovered here without the hard-401'ing `auth.jwt` middleware; `following` is therefore always false for this endpoint. Documented gap, see task-3 report (noda-limitation).

config.query: SELECT metadata->>'username' AS username, metadata->>'bio' AS bio, metadata->>'image' AS image FROM auth_users WHERE metadata->>'username' = $1
